name: JShunter
desc: jshunter is a command-line tool designed for analyzing JavaScript files and extracting endpoints. This tool specializes in identifying sensitive data, such as …
descFull: jshunter is a command-line tool designed for analyzing JavaScript files and extracting endpoints. This tool specializes in identifying sensitive data, such as API endpoints and potential security vulnerabilities, making it an essential resource for and bug bounty hunters and security researchers.
